//: Tamil locale — placeholder (English) strings shipped intentionally. Per Phase 1.5.1 D14 (option b): structure first, native-Tamil reviewer fills these in before the language switcher is exposed to customers. The 'languageTamil' label below uses Tamil script so the switcher button reads correctly even before the rest is translated.

common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

auth.errorFleetNameRequired: Fleet Name is required for sign up
auth.errorNetwork: Cannot reach the server. Please check your internet connection.
auth.errorServerWithStatus: Server error (HTTP {{status}}). The fleet-signup function may not be deployed yet.
auth.errorPostSignUpSignIn: Account created but sign-in failed. Please use the Login tab.
